schema: UOS universal graph package — full-service community CU, public-data build
archetype: #2 full-service community CU (federal charter), San Diego County
build_guardrails: rates dated 2026-06-12 from missionfed.com/rates — subject to change without notice

Institution.name: Mission Federal Credit Union
Institution.field_of_membership: Community — anyone who lives, works, worships, or attends school in San Diego County; volunteers/members of partner organizations; immediate family/household of existing member; Mission Fed employees
Institution.asset_size: ~$7.2B (public estimate; confirm via NCUA 5300 call report)
Institution.mission_statement: Earning trust, investing in our membership's success and caring for our community.

Product.name: Breeze Spending Account
Product.monthly_fee: $0 (no monthly, maintenance, overdraft, or NSF fees)
Product.early_paycheck: up to 2 days early with direct deposit
Product.overdraft_coverage: up to $200 (requires qualifying direct deposit of $500+); up to $50 without direct deposit; no OD fee charged

Product.name: Easy Checking
Product.monthly_fee: $0 with enrollment in online/mobile banking; $2/month without

Product.name: Smart Checking
Product.monthly_fee: $0 with $500/month direct deposit OR $1,500 avg daily balance; $7/month otherwise

Product.name: Standard Savings
features: no monthly fee or minimum balance

Product.name: Special Rate Savings
features: no minimum daily balance or max balance cap
must open at branch or by phone

Product.name: Ultra Money Market
features: not available for IRA or business accounts

Product.name: Standard Share Certificate
Product.auto_renewal: renews into like-term standard certificate at prevailing rate unless member elects otherwise
Product.early_withdrawal_penalty: NEEDS_FI — exact penalty schedule not published on rate page; refer to TIS disclosure

Product.name: 4-Month Promotional Certificate
features: new money only (not from existing Mission Fed deposits)
auto-renews into standard closest-like-term certificate at prevailing rate

Product.name: 8-Month Flex Promotional Certificate
features: deposits earn from day of deposit
additional deposits not available for business accounts

Product.name: IRA / Retirement Savings Accounts
Product.min_deposit: NEEDS_FI — not stated on rate page

Product.name: Youth Savings
Product.joint_required: parent/legal guardian required if under 16; ages 16–17 with valid govt ID do not require joint signer
Product.mission2save: 5% APY on first $500 for ages 0–12 (Mission 2 $AVE program)

Product.name: Auto Loan (2022 and Newer)
Product.payment_deferral: first payment up to 90 days for qualified members (interest accrues)
features: refinance fee may apply on Mission Fed refinances

Product.name: Auto Loan (2017–2021)
Product.financing_ltv: up to 120% of Retail KBB (used vehicles)
features: payment deferral up to 90 days for qualified members

Product.name: Recreational Vehicle (RV) Loan
Product.financing_ltv: up to 100% of NADA retail (used) or MSRP (new)
features: first payment deferral up to 90 days

Product.name: Personal Line of Credit
Product.rate_adjust: quarterly (January, April, July, October) based on index + 5%

Product.name: 30-Year Fixed Mortgage (Conforming)
features: fixed monthly P&I for life of loan

Product.name: Home Equity Line of Credit (HELOC)
Product.early_close_fee: recoupment of 3rd party fees if closed within 3 years
features: fixed intro rate 12 months then variable

Product.name: Interest Only HELOC
Product.term: 25-year total (10-year draw IO, 15-year fully amortizing repayment)
features: fully amortizing P&I for 15-year repayment period

Product.name: Premier World Mastercard
Product.intro_rate: 0% for 12 months on purchases and balance transfers posted in first 90 days
Product.balance_transfer_method: cashier's check from Mission Fed branch or contact center to third-party (electronic BT does not qualify for intro APR)

Product.name: Preferred Platinum Mastercard
Product.intro_rate: 0% for 12 months on purchases and balance transfers posted in first 90 days

Product.name: Preferred Platinum Rewards Mastercard
Product.intro_rate: 0% for 12 months on purchases and balance transfers posted in first 90 days
Product.rewards_detail: NEEDS_FI — rewards earn rate/structure not published on public rate page

Product.name: Business Standard Checking
features: additional fees for transactions over limit

Product.name: Business Special Rate Savings
features: no minimum daily balance or max balance cap
must open at branch or by phone

Product.name: Share Secured Loan
Product.rate_detail: NEEDS_FI — rate not published on public rate page

Product.name: Instant Short-Term Loan
Product.apply_channel: mobile or online banking only (Quick Apply)
Product.limits: max 1 open at a time; max 3 per 6 months; max 1 application per 15 days
Product.rate_detail: NEEDS_FI — rate/amount not published on public page

Feature.name: Zelle P2P Payments
Feature.description: Send and receive money via Zelle; requires US bank account; mobile carrier fees may apply

Feature.name: Mobile Deposit (RDC)
Feature.description: Deposit checks via mobile app; subject to verification; may not be available immediately

Feature.name: EasySave Round-Up
Feature.description: Rounds non-ATM debit card transactions up to nearest dollar and transfers difference to savings; not available for business accounts; ATM transactions excluded

Feature.name: Overdraft Protection
Feature.description: Discretionary overdraft protection; fee $14 per use (negative balance > $10); $42 daily max fee; may be revoked without notice; Reg E opt-in for ATM/debit

Feature.name: BALANCE Financial Wellness
Feature.description: Free access to BALANCE financial wellness tools and resources for all Mission Fed members

Feature.name: LiveSmart Insurance Services
Feature.description: Insurance products offered through LiveSmart Insurance Services: auto, home, personal insurance; third-party service

Feature.name: Investment Services (Raymond James)
Feature.description: Investment and estate planning services provided through Raymond James partnership; not NCUA insured, not deposits

Feature.name: Mission 2 $AVE Youth Bonus Rate
Feature.description: 5% APY on first $500 on deposit for members ages 0–12; part of Youth Savings product

Segment.name: Consumer / Retail Member
Segment.description: Primary segment: individuals who live, work, worship, or attend school in San Diego County; also family/household of existing member

Segment.name: Youth / Student
Segment.description: Members ages 0–17; Mission 2 $AVE program for ages 0–12; minor accounts require joint adult signer under 16

Segment.name: Business / Member-Business
Segment.description: Business accounts for sole proprietors, partnerships, corporations operating in San Diego; documentation required; CDD/beneficial ownership applies

Segment.name: Non-Profits / Schools
Segment.description: Dedicated Mission Money programs for non-profits (missionfed.com/npo) and schools (MissionMoney Advantage); specific products NEEDS_FI

Channel.name: Branch Network (30+)
Channel.description: 30+ branch locations across San Diego County; appointment scheduling available; branch-only products include Special Rate Savings, share secured loans, business accounts

Channel.name: Contact Center
Channel.description: Phone and secure web chat support; 24/7 access stated; handles account service, loan applications, business wire processing

Channel.name: Online Banking
Channel.description: 24/7 web-based account access at secure.missionfed.com; bill pay, account management, Zelle, Quick Apply loans, eStatements

Channel.name: Mobile Banking App
Channel.description: iOS and Android mobile app; mobile deposit, Zelle, Instant Short-Term Loan (Quick Apply), account management; early paycheck access with Breeze Spending

Channel.name: CO-OP ATM Network
Channel.description: 30,000 fee-free ATMs nationwide via CO-OP network; shared branching; ATM deposits subject to CO-OP cutoff (~3:00 PM PT)

Pricing.name: Smart Checking Dividend Rate
Pricing.notes: Requires minimum $500 to earn dividends; rates subject to change without notice

Pricing.name: Savings & Money Market Rates
Pricing.notes: Rates variable and subject to change without notice; APYs assume dividends remain on deposit

Pricing.name: Promotional Certificate Rates
Pricing.notes: New money only; max $1M combined promo certs per household; auto-renews to standard like-term cert

Pricing.name: Standard Certificate Rates
Pricing.notes: APYs anticipated and variable unless otherwise stated; certificate earns opening APY for term; penalties for early withdrawal

Pricing.name: IRA / Retirement / Education Account Rates
Pricing.notes: IRA certificate rates follow standard certificate rate schedule; annual contribution limits and IRS rules apply

Pricing.name: Auto Loan Rates (as of 2026-06-12)
Pricing.notes: APRs are best rates; actual rate based on credit and other criteria; subject to change without notice

Pricing.name: Personal Loan Rates (as of 2026-06-12)
Pricing.notes: Personal loan $500 min / $30,000 max; LOC variable adjusts quarterly; max $100K total unsecured per member

Pricing.name: Mortgage Rates (as of 2026-06-12)
Pricing.rate_caveat: illustrative; for current rates see daily mortgage rates page; assumptions: single-family primary residence CA, credit score 740+, CLTV 60% or less

tiers.product: Fixed Rate 2nd TD 30 Year due in 15

Pricing.name: Credit Card Rates (as of 2026-06-12)
Pricing.notes: All cards: no annual fee; 0% intro applies to purchases and BTs in first 90 days; BT must use cashier's check method for intro APR eligibility

Pricing.name: Business Fee Schedule
Pricing.fee_date: NEEDS_FI — document dated by PDF metadata; confirm current version
Pricing.notes: Excess transaction fees apply; refer to current PDF for full schedule

Disclosure.name: Account Agreement and Disclosures
Disclosure.notes: Master membership/account terms; version date NEEDS_FI from PDF metadata

Disclosure.name: Truth In Savings Act (TIS) Disclosure
Disclosure.notes: Covers APY, dividend rates, fees for all deposit products

Disclosure.name: Checking/Spending Account Disclosure
Disclosure.notes: Dated 10.22 per filename; confirm current version

Disclosure.name: Consumer Fee Schedule
Disclosure.notes: Current version linked from rates page and product pages; version date NEEDS_FI from PDF

Disclosure.name: ATM & Mastercard Debit Card Cardholder Disclosure
Disclosure.notes: Dated 03.21 per filename; confirm current version

Disclosure.name: Platinum Mastercard Credit Card Cardholder Agreement
Premier World Mastercard Credit Card Cardholder Agreement
Dividend Rates & Disclosures (PDF)
Disclosure.notes: Full published rate schedule including all deposit products; version date NEEDS_FI

customer_account_note: Customer[] and Account[] are intentionally empty. No member PII collected. Bulk personal data requires consent-via-Curql or equivalent before EVENT/table use.
public_data_gaps: NEEDS_FI: NMLS ID for Mission Fed (not published on public website)
NEEDS_FI: Asset size exact — use NCUA 5300 call report for charter #14384 (website says ~$7.2B)
NEEDS_FI: Fee schedule detail — consumer fee schedule PDF not parsed; full fee amounts (wire fees, replacement card fees, stop payment, etc.) require PDF fetch
NEEDS_FI: Business fee schedule detail — excess transaction fees, business wire fees require PDF fetch
NEEDS_FI: IRA certificate minimum deposit — not stated on public rate page
NEEDS_FI: Mortgage NMLS ID — not found on public pages fetched
NEEDS_FI: Share secured loan rate — not published on public rate page
NEEDS_FI: Instant Short-Term Loan amount/rate — not published on public page
NEEDS_FI: Preferred Platinum Rewards Mastercard earn rate — rewards structure not published on rate page
NEEDS_FI: Business loan / MBL details — business lending rates and terms not published on public website (product exists per archetype, not confirmed from public page)
NEEDS_FI: Commercial Real Estate loan rates — page exists (missionfed.com/other-loans/commercial-real-estate/) but not fetched
NEEDS_FI: Boat/motorcycle loan rates — listed as products, separate rate PDF referenced but not fetched
NEEDS_FI: Overdraft/NSF fee exact amounts — consumer fee schedule PDF not parsed; $14 OD protection fee confirmed from business page; consumer NSF fee NEEDS_FI
NEEDS_FI: Funds availability / Reg CC hold schedule — Account Agreement PDF not parsed
NEEDS_FI: Dividend rates PDF full schedule — PDF linked but not parsed
NEEDS_FI: Daily mortgage rates page — separate page referenced for current rates (illustrative rates only on main rates page)
NEEDS_FI: Business loan (MBL) program and rates — must be confirmed as publicly available product vs. branch-only
NEEDS_FI: Routing number for business wire / ABA verification — 322281507 confirmed from website footer
